description_long: This is a medium-sized detached house with a red gable roof and white exterior walls, situated on a rectangular grassy plot. The front facade features a covered entryway with a small porch, a central door, and two windows on either side, while a dormer window is visible on the upper story. The roof is pitched and tiled, with a main section and a smaller gable extension over the porch. The side views reveal a garage integrated into the structure, as well as additional windows and a simple, clean wall design. The rear of the house has two windows and a plain wall, lacking any major architectural features. The house appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or brick, with tiled roofing and glass windows, and is designed for residential use in a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A white, two-story house with a red gable roof, front porch, and integrated garage, set on a grassy plot.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entryway with a covered porch, central door, two windows, and a dormer window above.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the garage entrance and the side profile of the gable roof.
description_view_2: The rear view displays two simple windows and a plain wall, with no entry or decorative features.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the side wall and the extension of the roof, with minimal window openings.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with central door, flanked by windows, and a small overhang.
